clean_story:
Now I will teach you past.

Past is like footprints in mud—you see where feet were, not where they are. When sun was high but now is low, that high-sun time is past. When fire burns stick to ash, stick is past, ash is now. Your belly full after eating berries? Hunger before bite is past. If you remember roar of lion yesterday, that roar is past—gone like smoke from old fire.
